sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49285" key="quelloto/kos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θῠελλο-τόκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n49285.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">producing storms</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:28:277" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">28.277</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
